# Feature Request

**Use this template when proposing a new feature or enhancement for FlashFusion.**

---

## Summary

<!-- A clear, one-sentence description of the feature you are proposing -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What user pain point or opportunity does it address? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature as you envision it. What would it look and feel like? -->

## User Story

<!-- As a [type of user], I want [some goal] so that [some reason / benefit] -->

As a **[role]**, I want **[feature]** so that **[benefit]**.

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- What conditions must be true for this feature to be considered complete? -->
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternatives? Why is this approach better? -->

## Impact & Effort Estimate

| Dimension | Assessment |
|---|---|
| User value | High / Medium / Low |
| Estimated effort | Hours / Days / Weeks |
| Affected components | e.g., Dashboard, Auth, API |
| Breaking change? | Yes / No |

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, links to similar features in other products, related issues, etc. -->

## Priority Suggestion

- [ ] **P1 — Must Have (current milestone)**
- [ ] **P2 — Should Have (next milestone)**
- [ ] **P3 — Nice to Have (backlog)**
